original_image_tags: A scanned image of the front of a used, brownish paper envelope. It features a handwritten return address and addressee, a circular postmark, and a partial slogan cancellation stamp.

elements.description: A brown envelope front with a circular postmark, a rectangular stamp, and a white address label. The postmark reads 'STOKE NEWINGTON / 7.15 PM / 26 OCT. / 1954 / N.16.'. To its right is a rectangular stamp with the text 'CIVIL D / JOIN'. The white label is handwritten in purple ink: 'THE CITY MAYOR / TUCSON. / ARIZONA / U. S. A.'.

judge.reason: Description A states a 'partial slogan cancellation stamp' while Description B provides a specific 'rectangular stamp' with text 'CIVIL D / JOIN'—these are contradictory descriptions of the same stamp element.
